talks.title: Quantum Machine learning using a Resource-Efficient Quantum Kernel
talks.description: Invited research talk presenting resource-efficient quantum kernel methods and their implications for near-term quantum machine learning.

talks.title: Quantum Machine Learning with Qiskit
talks.description: Talk at Qiskit Fall Fest covering practical approaches to quantum machine learning and hands-on Qiskit workflows.

talks.title: A Resource-Efficient Quantum Kernel — Award Presentation
talks.description: Research presentation recognized with the Deep Tech Canada NRC Student Award at Quantum Days 2024.
talks.award: Deep Tech Canada NRC Student Award

talks.title: Quantum Machine Learning for the Real World
talks.description: Research poster recognized with Second Best Poster award at the University of Ottawa's centennial quantum science workshop.

training.title: QAMP 2025 — Mentor & Contributor
training.description: Contributed to and mentored in the Qiskit Advocate Mentorship Program 2025 cohort, delivering a functional quantum research outcome.

training.title: Qiskit Fall Fest 2025 — Mentor
training.description: Served as official mentor for the 2025 Qiskit Fall Fest, guiding participants through quantum computing and Qiskit workshops.
